_note: Igbo translation — technical vocabulary for software/tech careers is not yet standardised in Igbo. English terms are retained where no established equivalent exists.

hero.eyebrow: Kwụsị ịchọ ụzọ n'ime teknụzụ n'emebighị ihe.
hero.heading: Chọta ụzọ teknụzụ kwesịtara gị.
hero.subheading: Mee nnwale ọ dị mkpirikpi wee chọpụta ọrụ teknụzụ kacha mma maka gị, ihe ị ga-ụmụ, na otu ị ga-amalite.
hero.tagline: Enweghị nchegbu. Enweghị maapụ ndị emetụtaghị ahu. Naanị mbido kacha doo anya.

careers.title: Ụzọ ọrụ
careers.remote: Ọrụ n'ebe dị anya kwere omume

salaries.title: Ụgwọ ọrụ n'ọrụ teknụzụ.
salaries.disclaimer: Ụgwọ ọrụ ndị a bụ nchekọcha ma ọ bụrụ na ha na-anọchite anya ọnọdụ ahịa nke 2025.

footer.tagline: Nchọpụta ọrụ open source maka ndị na-ahọrọ nka teknụzụ ha na-esote.
footer.copyright: © 2025 NextSkill. Open source n'okpuru ikike MIT.
footer.madeWith: Arụpụtara ya na ❤️ maka onye ọ bụla na-achọ ụzọ ya n'ime teknụzụ.
